summary: Iteration 106 - Header Management, i18n, and FAZ-3 Academy Feature Flag Testing Complete. All requirements verified: Admin header management with guest/auth/corporate tabs working, public site/header API returns correct mode configs, PUT API increments version, navigation-summary academy.modules empty with feature_flag_disabled.

backend_api_put_admin_site_header.tested: Link list saved and version incremented from 8 to 9

public_site_header_component.guest_mode: Renders dynamic items from backend with fallback preserved
public_site_header_component.auth_mode: Renders dynamic items for authenticated users

dealer_layout_v2_corporate.corporate_links: Fetches /api/site/header?mode=corporate and renders dynamic links in Row1
dealer_layout_v2_corporate.logo_source: Uses corporateLogoUrl from useUIHeaderConfig or fallback 'S Ofisim'

faz3_academy_feature_flag.verified: Seed sets academy.enabled=False, API returns empty modules array

i18n_language_context.admin_labels_translated: Header Yönetimi, Link Yönetimi, etc. displayed in Turkish
i18n_language_context.frontend_loads: App loads without errors after i18n integration

seed_data_creation: Test link 'Test Link Iteration106' added to guest header via PUT API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Header management fully functional with 3 modes (guest/auth/corporate). Version is at 9. FAZ-3 academy feature flag verified - seed.py sets academy.enabled=False, navigation-summary returns empty modules array with data_source=feature_flag_disabled. i18n integration working with TR/DE/FR languages configured in LanguageContext.
